# UC-13.6.5 · Grafana User Login Audit and Session Anomalies

## Description

Credential stuffing and stolen SSO tokens surface as clustered failed Grafana logins or impossible travel patterns between IP addresses. Hourly rollups on audit events provide a lightweight detective control without full SIEM noise.

## Value

Supports identity investigations and demonstrates access monitoring for regulated Grafana deployments.

## Implementation

Ensure `username`, `src_ip`, and `action` are extracted. Enrich `src_ip` with geo ASN lookup. Join to HR offboarding list for terminated-account usage. Forward to Enterprise Security if available.

## SPL

```spl
index=observability sourcetype="grafana:audit"
| search action="login*" OR action="logout*" OR match(lower(_raw),"(?i)invalid password|auth failed")
| eval failed=if(match(lower(_raw),"(?i)invalid|failed|denied"),1,0)
| bin _time span=1h
| stats count as attempts, sum(failed) as fails, dc(username) as users by _time, src_ip, org_id
| eval fail_rate=round(100*fails/nullif(attempts,0),2)
| where fails >= 15 OR fail_rate > 25
| sort -fails
```

## Visualization

Choropleth map, timeline of failed logins, top src_ip bar chart.
